The classification of Amphilophis piptathera places it in the kingdom Animalia, phylum Chordata, class Reptilia, order Squamata, and family Colubridae. Within the family Colubridae, it belongs to the subfamily Dipsadinae. Its classification is subject to ongoing research and potential revisions as new information becomes available.
